flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Irvine Valley College rose 38% between 2007 and 2010 ($4.0k → $5.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Irvine Valley College rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($608 → $827).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Irvine Valley College rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.8k → $11.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Irvine Valley College rose 118% between 2007 and 2010 (5.3k → 11.6k).
